entity.title: Standard Cleaning

body.processed:
Our standard cleaning service covers everything you need to maintain a clean, comfortable home. Our trained teams follow a detailed checklist to ensure consistent results every visit.

Room-by-Room Coverage

We clean all rooms including bedrooms, living areas, kitchens, and bathrooms. Each visit includes dusting all surfaces, vacuuming and mopping floors, cleaning and sanitizing bathrooms, and tidying the kitchen.

Your Satisfaction Guaranteed

If you're not happy with any aspect of our cleaning, we'll return within 24 hours to make it right at no additional charge.
body.summary: Our standard cleaning service covers everything you need to maintain a clean, comfortable home. Our trained teams follow a detailed checklist to ensure consistent results every visit.Room-by-Room Cove

entity.summary: Comprehensive home cleaning covering all rooms with a detailed checklist.

entity.title: Deep Cleaning

body.processed:
Our deep cleaning service goes beyond the surface to tackle built-up grime, forgotten corners, and areas that don't get attention during regular cleaning. Perfect for a first-time cleaning, seasonal refresh, or before hosting guests.

What Makes It Deep

We clean inside appliances, behind furniture, scrub grout, clean baseboards, wipe down cabinet fronts, and detail areas that accumulate dust and buildup over time. This service typically takes twice as long as a standard cleaning.

entity.summary: Intensive top-to-bottom cleaning for a fresh start or seasonal refresh.

entity.title: Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning

body.processed:
Starting fresh in a new home or leaving your old one spotless for the next owners? Our move-in/move-out cleaning service ensures every surface is pristine. We clean empty homes from top to bottom, including areas that are impossible to reach when furnished.

Ideal For

  • Renters moving out and wanting their security deposit back
  • New homeowners wanting a fresh start
  • Landlords preparing a property for new tenants
  • Real estate agents staging homes for sale

body.processed:
Pristine Home Cleaning was founded in 2011 by Maria Vasquez, a single mom who saw an opportunity to build a cleaning business that treated both clients and employees with respect. Today, our team of 45+ cleaning professionals serves hundreds of homes across the greater Austin area.

Our Difference

Every Pristine cleaner goes through a rigorous background check, 40 hours of hands-on training, and ongoing quality evaluations. We use exclusively eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning products that are safe for children, pets, and the environment.

Community Commitment

We donate cleaning services to families in need through our partnership with local shelters and social services organizations. Because everyone deserves to come home to a clean space.

Ready for a cleaner home? Request a quote online or give us a call. We respond to all inquiries within one hour during business hours.

Office Hours

Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

Service Area

We serve Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Georgetown, Pflugerville, and surrounding communities within a 30-mile radius of downtown Austin.

Get in Touch

Phone: (512) 555-0294
Email: hello@pristinehomecleaning.com
